programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will gets a teaching job; Grace runs for office; Jack tries to settle down; Karen goes missing.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Jack fears for his grandson's safety at a Texas talent show; Grace and Noah try to have sex.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Jack channels Rosario to help Karen; Grace learns love means having to say she's sorry.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Grace reveals a secret; Miss Coco Peru emcees a lip-sync contest to see who will be Jack's best man.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: When Will discovers Noah has a child, he promises to keep the secret from Grace.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Grace unintentionally meets Noah's daughter; Will's mom visits; Jack gets into an argument.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will seeks advice from Jack on how not to be himself; Karen stalks Lorraine Finster.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will, Karen and Jack unknowingly take hallucinogens; a client takes up with Grace's sister Janet.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: The plan to win over Will's new boss goes awry; Jack does damage control on his birthday.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will uses a mock trial in an attempt to repair the rift between Karen and her stepdaughter.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Malcolm enlists Grace to help win back Karen; a workplace flirtation lands Will in hot water.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will gives newscaster McCoy Whitman another chance; Grace's campaign hits a snag -- her nemesis Val.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Jack's insistence that Will be nicer to Estefan backfires; Grace knocks over a prominent figure.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Grace is shocked when her dad refuses a transfusion of Will's blood.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will and Grace use each other as an excuse to get out of moving in with their boyfriends.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Jack realizes he lost 13 gold coins he's supposed to give Estefan at their wedding to avoid a curse.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Jack and Estefan's destination wedding takes a detour when they're forced to marry at the airport.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Grace returns from her European travels a new woman but soon receives life-changing news.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Karen orchestrates a "Mamma Mia" situation with the potential baby daddies of Grace's baby.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will discovers a way to finally get back at Jack for years of mocking his hairline.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will and Grace get competitive over whose process of having a baby is more difficult.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: After Will and McCoy break up, Grace and Jack hire the Grief Panda to help Will process his pain.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will meets a potential surrogate who has stellar reviews, but her lifestyle choices give him doubts.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Grace and her neighbor give their romance another shot; Will decides it's time for Jack to grow up.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will and Grace set out to prove that their child would be the better candidate for an elite school.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will and Grace intervene when they discover Grace's niece is dating a bisexual man.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Marilyn goes behind Grace's back to fix her up with a couple interested in adopting Grace's baby.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: When James invites Grace to his job at the aquarium, she endangers his job and a species.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Karen introduces Will and Grace to the new love of her life, but they are suspicious of him.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will and Grace race to save Karen when they think she is in danger in the woods with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Jack helps Karen sneak into the manse to get her ring, and they are shocked by where they find it.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will ropes Dr. DiLorenzo into going on a fake date so he can spy on his surrogate.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Grace, Karen and Jack each imagine themselves as Lucy, with Will as the Ricky to all of them.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Karen celebrates her baseball team's championship; Will and Grace go to an open house.

programme.title: Will & Grace ('17)
programme.desc: Will tries not to reminisce about his ex; Grace has false alarms of going into labor.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will tries to be supportive when Grace receives an unexpected marriage proposal.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will mulls asking Grace to share his place when she considers renting across town.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace asks Will if they can merge two small bathrooms into one master bathroom.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace gets carried away with a cowboy theme when she decorates Harlin's apartment.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Karen head out to party, while Will and Grace go trick-or-treating with Harlan's kids.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack tells Grace that Will once had an affair with a client.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace blames her lack of interest in dating on her relationship with Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace asks for Will's advice when she decides to buy her office space.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will develops a dog obsession after Grace brings home a puppy, forcing her to take action.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace and Will eavesdrop on a real-life soap opera in the neighbors' apartment.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Grace take Will to "Champions on Ice" for his birthday; guest Rudy Galindo.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will hires a maid for the apartment; Jack poses as lawyer to impress a cute guy.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's mother (Debbie Reynolds), a would-be star, suggests Grace and Will marry.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace surprises Will by inviting his older brother to Jack's birthday party.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tells resentful Will of her romance with Sam; Karen hires Jack as assistant.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace and Will learn they both have a date with a new neighbor (David Newsom).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace reunites with an old flame in Vermont on a getaway with the gang; guest Tom Bosley.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Grace gets sick, Will starts spending time with a new neighbor (Molly Shannon).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will learns a lesson about prejudice from Jack; Karen tells Grace about her rocky marriage.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A successful publicist hires Grace to decorate his office with the condition that Will dates him.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: The roommates' pals don't care for competitive games; Karen saves a man using CPR.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Roommates rethink their living arrangement; Jack weds Karen's maid.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace moves and gives a dinner party without Will's help.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace decides to run against Will in an upcoming election for president of the board of tenants.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace decides to run against Will in an upcoming election for president of the board of tenants.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace gets attention after a newspaper publishes a photo in which she appears buxom.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace gets jealous when her mother (Debbie Reynolds) dotes on Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will dismisses faithful clients after a powerful man inflates his ego.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack challenges unemployed Will to join his staff as a caterer/waiter.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack hopes to reveal his homosexuality to his mother (Veronica Cartwright) over Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will represents Grace against a lawyer who ends up making Will a job offer.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Friends become jealous when Will and Grace begin hanging out with a hip young couple.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will must bring in a major new client by the end of the week or else lose his job.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's best friend from high school visits with an unusual request.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will experiences strange dreams while Grace dates his therapist.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will learns that his father has been covering up Will's homosexuality.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Jack go to the network and have an unexpected meeting with the "Today" show's Al Roker.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will gets advice from Jack on how to handle a blind date arranged by his boss.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's ex-boyfriend returns; Karen asks Grace for greater responsibilities at work.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen's husband has a heart attack.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace recruits Will to help at a community center; Jack donates Karen's shoes to charity.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace confesses to Will that she once had an affair with Rob.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace suspects Val may have stolen her music box; Jack plays straight to woo a heterosexual convert.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace visit an old college professor and get a scary look at their potential future.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen's friend turns out to be Grace's competition for a job.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Without Will knowing, Grace has a romantic liaison with his boss (Gregory Hines).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Without Will knowing, Grace has a romantic liaison with his boss; Rosario wants a divorce from Jack.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will returns from vacation to find Jack and Grace closer than he would like them to be.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's apartment becomes a haven for Grace after a break-in attempt.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will volunteers to baby-sit for two friends raising a baby girl.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is appalled when her new intern suddenly emulates Karen and takes on her brash persona.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace decides to break up with Ben (Gregory Hines), but his charm makes her reconsider.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: An old boyfriend invites Grace to a romantic escapade with him and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will receives a gift-certificate to consult a psychic (Camryn Manheim); Jack meets his icon, Cher.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: In a flashback to Thanksgiving Day 1985, Grace invites boyfriend Will home to meet her family.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: In a flashback to Thanksgiving Day 1985, Grace invites boyfriend Will home to meet her family.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace has trouble accepting her new beau when she learns he has six toes on one of his feet.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will worries that Grace behaves more like a wife than an old friend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace pose as millionaires while visiting the townhouse of Sandra Bernhard.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Sports-challenged Will tries to impress his new friend (Patrick Dempsey) with his athletic skills.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is torn over ending his newfound relationship with Matt, a rising TV sportscaster.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace has Will sell her dead uncle's car to a nun (Ellen DeGeneres), then wants it back.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace catches Will's philandering father on the arm of a stranger.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is shocked when she catches Will's philandering father on the arm of a glamorous stranger.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen tries to keep Grace from dating her attractive nephew, Sumner.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace compromises Will's weekly poker sessions with the guys.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace buys a piano in hope of strengthening her friendship with Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) attempts to get rid of her slovenly new neighbor (guest star Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Guilty Grace drags Will to the funeral of classmate she once tormented.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to keep secret her embarrassing romance with a slovenly neighbor.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to mediate between Will and new-tenant Nathan (Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to mediate between Will and new-tenant Nathan (Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Nathan (Woody Harrelson) feels neglected when Will and Grace resume their chummy friendship.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will suffers flashbacks when a childhood bully (Adam Goldberg) is hired by his law firm.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack coerces Grace into posing as his son Elliot's date to a school dance.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace moves into Karen's apartment to help her worried friend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack arranges a date between his smitten supervisor (Parker Posey) and unsuspecting Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Nathan's marriage proposal doesn't fulfill Grace's childhood fantasy, and she finds it dispiriting.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Jack and Karen try to cheer Grace, who is depressed after losing Nathan.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace back different candidates for the upcoming mayoral election.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day, the friends band together for a motor tour of their dysfunctional families.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day, the friends band together for a motor tour of their dysfunctional families.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: At the gym, Will sees a man who seems familiar.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Retailer Barney's hires Grace to decorate the display windows for the holidays.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace schemes to hook up the mistress of Will's father with another man.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace rediscovers a handsome high-school friend who's doing time.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace reveals her ex-boyfriend's faults at his wedding rehearsal.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace reveals her ex-boyfriend's faults at his wedding rehearsal.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack uses Grace to defeat a rival for a spot in a gay men's chorus.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace illegally sublet their old flat to finance their new large apartment.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace move into their dream apartment but find that they miss their old one.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will presents his parents with a cruise for their anniversary.
